inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Data that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress. Specify data using one of the following keys. Important: When you use more than one key, string is appended first, bytes is appended second, and stream is appended last and Integration Server uses the first key that it encounters.

inputs.name: compressionScheme
inputs.description: The compression method you want the pub.compress:compressData service to apply to compress the data. The supported compression schemes are gzip and deflate .

inputs.name: loadAs
inputs.description: Form in which you want the pub.compress:compressData service to store the output data. Set to: bytes to store the data as a byte[ ]. stream to store the data as a java.io.InputStream.

inputs.name: encoding
inputs.description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set that specifies the encoding to use when converting the String to an array of bytes (for example: ISO-8859-1 ).

outputs.name: compressedData
outputs.description: Compressed data after applying the compression scheme.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Data that you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to decompress. Specify data using one of the following keys.

inputs.name: compressionScheme
inputs.description: The compression scheme you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to apply to decompress the data. The supported compression schemes are gzip and deflate .

inputs.name: loadAs
inputs.description: Form in which you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to store the returned document. Set to: bytes to return the data as a byte[ ]. stream to return the data as a java.io.InputStream.

outputs.name: decompressedData
outputs.description: Decompressed data after applying the compression algorithm.
